title: Kaal
tmdbOverview: After a series of deaths in Orbit Wildlife Park are attributed to a man-eating tiger, wildlife reporter Krish Thapar decides to investigate the incidents for a magazine article. But something deadlier than tigers hunts in the forest.
synopsis: Kaal is a 2005 action, thriller and horror film from India. It has a 4.7 rating on IMDb. A standout of 2000s cinema, it earns its spot on our lists. It carries a 16 certification (DE rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
